center.name: 圣克鲁斯-德拉谢拉
center.summary: 圣克鲁斯-德拉谢拉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Eastern striolated puffbird、红额金刚鹦鹉，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies of eastern striolated puffbird is found in the south central Amazon Basin, in Brazil between the Madeira and Tapajós rivers, and into extreme northeastern Bolivia (Santa Cruz Department)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-fronted macaw is native to a small mountainous area of south-central Bolivia situated about 200 km west of Santa Cruz, in the department of the same name, where the climate is medium altitude semi-desert

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The nominate subspecies of eastern striolated puffbird is found in the south central Amazon Basin, in Brazil between the Madeira and Tapajós rivers, and into extreme northeastern Bolivia (Santa Cruz Department)
